message: Direct InstalledKernel.ShouldHandleAsync and HandleAsync now call ValidateFor(adapter) before building input or executing. Added regression tests for SGP031 unsubscribed direct HandleAsync and SGP033 direct ShouldHandleAsync signature mismatch. Validation: dotnet test tests/SafeIR.Tests/SafeIR.Tests.csproj --filter FullyQualifiedName~PluginHookSignatureTests.

Verified InstalledKernel direct ShouldHandleAsync/HandleAsync validate adapters before input/execution; dotnet test tests/SafeIR.Tests/SafeIR.Tests.csproj --filter FullyQualifiedName~PluginHookSignatureTests passed: 6/6.
